# Acid Digestion

**Summary**: Chemical processing of limestone to release and concentrate microfossils.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-hikmahtiar|Hikmahtiar, 2024]] applied acid-digestion to extract DWAF from the indurated limestone samples.
